name: SAS Anti-Money Laundering
description: End-to-end AML compliance platform providing transaction monitoring, watchlist screening, alert investigation, case management, network analytics, and automated regulatory reporting for AMLC, BSP, and international requirements.
elevatorPitch: End-to-end AML compliance — transaction monitoring, alert management, case investigation, and regulatory reporting.
capabilities: Real-time watchlist and sanctions screening with fuzzy matching
Network/graph analytics for layering and shell company detection
Customer risk scoring with dynamic EDD triggers
Alert prioritization with ML-based false positive reduction
targetBuyer: Chief Compliance Officer, MLRO, Head of Financial Crime, Head of AML Operations
phUseCases: Post-FATF grey list sustained compliance monitoring
AFASA mule account detection and reporting
